summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Silent Honor Foundation website - backend 100% functional, frontend authentication working but with browser automation detection issues

integration_issues.issue: Browser automation tests report login failure, but screenshots show successful login and dashboard access
integration_issues.details: The login functionality is working correctly (API tests pass, screenshots show successful dashboard access), but browser automation has timing/detection issues. This is a test infrastructure issue, not a functional bug.

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
Admin /me endpoint returns correct user data
Login page loads correctly with all form elements
Admin credentials can be entered in form fields
All HTML pages accessible (.html extension working)
JavaScript and CSS files loading correctly
Frontend shows successful login (dashboard visible in screenshots)

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (14/16 features working - login functional but automation detection issues)
